section_name: Certain County or Municipal Actions Prohibited
chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
Unless otherwise provided by state or federal law, a county or municipality may not require a permit, fee, or license for the operation of a vehicle combination described by Section 623.421 (Permit for Vehicles Transporting Fluid Milk) (a) or (b) in addition to a permit, fee, or license required by state law.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 623.405 (Route Restrictions) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.001 (Definitions) (68), eff. September 1, 2019.

Redesignated and amended by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.002(23), eff. September 1, 2019.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.425 — Certain County or Municipal Actions Prohibited

Unless otherwise provided by state or federal law, a county or municipality may not require a permit, fee, or license for the operation of a vehicle combination described by Section 623.421 (Permit for Vehicles Transporting Fluid Milk) (a) or (b) in addition to a permit, fee, or license required by state law.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 623.405 (Route Restrictions) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.001 (Definitions) (68), eff. September 1, 2019.

Redesignated and amended by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.002(23), eff. September 1, 2019.

*Added by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 750 (S.B.1383), Sec. 2, eff. January 1, 2018.*

subsections.text: Unless otherwise provided by state or federal law, a county or municipality may not require a permit, fee, or license for the operation of a vehicle combination described by Section 623.421 (Permit for Vehicles Transporting Fluid Milk) (a) or (b) in addition to a permit, fee, or license required by state law.
Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 623.405 (Route Restrictions) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.001 (Definitions) (68), eff. September 1, 2019.
Redesignated and amended by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.002(23), eff. September 1, 2019.
